tools.name: createEvent
tools.description: Create a new event with venue, date, capacity, budget, and format.

tools.name: addGuest
tools.description: Add a guest to an event with tier and dietary preferences.

tools.name: importGuestList
tools.description: Bulk import a guest list to an event.

tools.name: sendRSVPInvitation
tools.description: Send RSVP invitations to guests for an event.

tools.name: createRunOfShowItem
tools.description: Create a run of show item for an event.

tools.name: reorderRunOfShow
tools.description: Reorder run of show items for an event.

tools.name: addVendor
tools.description: Add a vendor to an event with service and cost.

tools.name: trackBudget
tools.description: Track event budget with spend breakdown by vendor.

tools.name: generatePostEventReport
tools.description: Generate a post-event report with attendance and performance stats.
